step_by_step_thinking:
The most frequent infections following solid organ transplants often involve viruses that can cause opportunistic infections due to immunosuppression. Cytomegalovirus (CMV) is one such virus known for its prevalence, particularly among lung transplant recipients but also seen across various types of transplants.
